SOURCE: 28697203.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (28697203.pdf)
SUMMARY: Skilled IT professional with 7 years of proven success in developing and leading cross-functional technical teams to execute and deliver major technology initiatives using the Agile methodology and Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe). Well-versed in managing projects with co-located and off-site teams. Expertise in gathering and translating requirements, leading scrum teams, and release management.
SKILLS: Agile methodology, Project management, SAFe Program Increment (PI) Planning, Scrum / Kanban / Scrumban, Aptitude for resolving challenging problems, Client relations, Team building, Release management, Scrum master / Business analyst, Atlassian suite (JIRA, Confluence, Trello), Public Trust Clearance Level 4, Budget, Business analyst, Concept, Client, Features, Functional, Managing, Meetings, Procurement, Project Management, Project plans, Real-time, Risk-assessment, SCADA, Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition, Fluent in Spanish

SOURCE: 28697203.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Project Manager
COMPANY: Company Name | City , State
DATES: 03/2019 - Current
DESCRIPTION: Support Design-Build SCADA Upgrade Project. Identify and implement technology tools for resource planning, encourage real-time team collaboration, develop streamlined workflows, introduce SAFe to prioritize fiscal year acquisition needs.

SOURCE: 28697203.pdf
JOB TITLE: Agile Project Manager
COMPANY: Company Name | City , State
DATES: 10/2014 - 03/2019
DESCRIPTION: Transition risk-assessment tools to web-based platform, develop project plans and cost estimates, manage changes in scope, schedule, and budget, participate in SAFe PI planning events.

SOURCE: 28697203.pdf
JOB TITLE: Release Manager
COMPANY: Company Name | City , State
DATES: 10/2014 - 03/2019
DESCRIPTION: Negotiate and manage release activities, ensure compatibility of final deliverables, facilitate production readiness reviews, resolve deployment issues.

SOURCE: 28697203.pdf
JOB TITLE: Business Analyst / Scrum Master
COMPANY: Company Name | City , State
DATES: 10/2014 - 03/2019
DESCRIPTION: Facilitate requirements meetings, daily scrums, sprint reviews, and planning sessions, capture and translate requirements, test application across environments.
